name: Uni Agent Template
description: A modular starter agent that produces a primary answer first, then safely appends UniAds V2 sponsor context when available.
main_functions: FastAPI /chat service for Agent Hub trial
ad_compatibility: All sponsored context requests use UniAds /v2/sponsor-context through the configured proxy. The primary answer is preserved, sponsor content is supplemental, sponsor failures fail open, and sensitive sponsored actions require a permission breakpoint.
